include_directories(
  SYSTEM
  )

add_library(hodlr SHARED
  herm_matrix_hodlr.cpp
  herm_matrix_h.cpp
  utils.cpp
  block.cpp
  blocks_keldysh.cpp
  dyson.cpp
  mol_gf2.cpp
  hubb_gf2.cpp
  hubb_gf2_ext.cpp
  hubb_gf2_2leg.cpp
  SC_gf2.cpp
  integration.cpp
  distributed_array.cpp
  distributed_single_timeslice.cpp
  distributed_single_timeslice_FT.cpp
  nband_nsite_SRSU_gf2.cpp
  nband_nsite_Hubbard_gf2.cpp
  )

#target_link_libraries(hodlr cntr cpsitop HighFive ${COMMON_LIBS})
#target_link_libraries(hodlr cntr cntr_hdf5 HighFive dlr_c ${COMMON_LIBS})
target_link_libraries(hodlr cntr cntr_hdf5 HighFive ${HDF5_LIBRARIES} dlr_c ${COMMON_LIBS} fftw3)

file(GLOB hodlr_HEADERS "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/*.hpp"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/*.h")
set_target_properties(hodlr PROPERTIES PUBLIC_HEADER "${hodlr_HEADERS}")

install(TARGETS hodlr LIBRARY DESTINATION lib PUBLIC_HEADER DESTINATION include/hodlr )
